ddls:
CREATE TABLE "journals" (
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each journal */,
  "journal_name" TEXT /* Name of the journal */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "issn" TEXT /* ISSN of the journal */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the journal */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the journal */,
  "homepage_url" TEXT /* URL of the journal's homepage */,
  "impact_factor" REAL /* Impact factor of the journal */,
  "submission_instructions" TEXT /* Instructions for submitting articles to the journal */,
  "editor_in_chief" TEXT /* Name of the editor-in-chief of the journal */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the journal was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("journal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article */,
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the journal where the article is published */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "doi" TEXT /* DOI (Digital Object Identifier) of the article */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date the article was published */,
  "access_policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the access policy for the article */,
  "open_data_policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the open data policy for the article */,
  "open_materials_policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the open materials policy for the article */,
  "preregistration_policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the preregistration policy for the article */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of publication */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the article */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the article (e.g., submitted, under review, accepted, published) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the article was last updated */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the article has been cited */,
  "funding_sources" TEXT /* Information about the funding sources for the article */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords associated with the article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_preregistration_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("preregistration_policy_id") REFERENCES preregistration_policies ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_access_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("access_policy_id") REFERENCES access_policies ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_open_data_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("open_data_policy_id") REFERENCES open_data_policies ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_journal_id FOREIGN KEY ("journal_id") REFERENCES journals ("journal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_open_materials_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("open_materials_policy_id") REFERENCES open_materials_policies ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access policy */,
  "policy_name" TEXT /* Name of the access policy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the access policy */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the policy is the default for new articles */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the policy was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the policy was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "open_data_policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each open data policy */,
  "policy_name" TEXT /* Name of the open data policy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the open data policy */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the policy is the default for new articles */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the policy was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the policy was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "open_materials_policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each open materials policy */,
  "policy_name" TEXT /* Name of the open materials policy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the open materials policy */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the policy is the default for new articles */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the policy was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the policy was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "preregistration_policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preregistration policy */,
  "policy_name" TEXT /* Name of the preregistration policy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the preregistration policy */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the policy is the default for new articles */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the policy was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the policy was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Institutional affiliation of the author */,
  "orcid" TEXT /* ORCID identifier of the author */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the author */,
  "profile_url" TEXT /* URL of the author's professional profile */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the author was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the author's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_authors" (
  "article_author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article-author relationship */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the author in the article (e.g., lead author, co-author) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the author was added to the article */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the author's role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_authors_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_authors_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., editor, reviewer, researcher) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the article */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the article was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the article */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user accessing the article */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_access_logs_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
